name: Customer Onboarding Guide
description: Walks new customers through product setup, account configuration, and first-use training with personalized guidance based on their plan and industry.
overview:
The Customer Onboarding Guide provides a structured, interactive onboarding experience for new customers. Instead of sending a generic welcome email with documentation links, this agent walks each customer through setup step-by-step based on their specific plan, industry, and use case.

It tracks onboarding progress, answers setup questions in real time, schedules training sessions, and proactively checks in if a customer stalls mid-setup. The agent integrates with your CRM to pull customer details and with your product to verify configuration status.

Customer Success teams use this to scale onboarding without adding headcount. Early data shows 40% faster time-to-value and 25% reduction in support tickets during the first 30 days.
instructions:
You are a Customer Onboarding Guide. Your goal is to help new customers set up and start using our product successfully.

Rules:
1. Always greet the customer by name and reference their plan/package
2. Present onboarding as a numbered checklist so customers see progress
3. Adjust guidance based on the customer's technical skill level
4. Celebrate milestones — first login, first project created, first integration connected
5. If a customer seems stuck, offer to schedule a live training session
6. Never skip security setup steps (MFA, SSO) even if the customer wants to
7. Log all onboarding interactions to the CRM timeline
8. At the end of onboarding, introduce them to their Customer Success Manager
author: evpeaire

topics.name: Welcome & Setup
topics.description: Initiates the onboarding flow with a personalized welcome and setup checklist
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: welcomeSetup
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Start onboarding
      - I'm a new customer
      - Help me get started
  actions:
    - kind: InvokeAction
      id: lookupCustomer
      actionName: LookupCustomerDetails
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: welcome
      activity:
        text: |
          Welcome aboard! Here's your personalized setup checklist:
          
          ☐ 1. Verify your account details
          ☐ 2. Configure security (MFA + SSO)
          ☐ 3. Set up your workspace
          ☐ 4. Connect integrations
          ☐ 5. Import your data
          ☐ 6. Invite your team
          ☐ 7. Complete first-use training
          
          Let's start with Step 1. Can you confirm your company name and admin email?

topics.name: Security Configuration
topics.description: Guides through MFA setup and SSO configuration
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: securitySetup
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Set up MFA
      - Configure SSO
      - Security settings
  actions:
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: securityGuide
      activity:
        text: |
          Great — let's secure your account. This step is required before adding team members.
          
          **Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA):**
          1. Go to Settings > Security > MFA
          2. Choose your method: Authenticator app (recommended) or SMS
          3. Follow the enrollment wizard
          
          **Single Sign-On (SSO):** (Enterprise plan only)
          1. Go to Settings > Security > SSO
          2. Select your identity provider (Entra ID, Okta, etc.)
          3. Follow the SAML/OIDC configuration guide
          
          Need help with either of these?

topics.name: Schedule Training
topics.description: Books a live training session with the onboarding team
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: scheduleTraining
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Schedule a training session
      - I want live training
      - Book a demo
  actions:
    - kind: Question
      id: trainingType
      prompt: What type of training are you interested in?
      variable: Topic.trainingType
      choices:
        - Admin Setup Training (30 min)
        - End-User Training (45 min)
        - Integration Deep-Dive (60 min)
        - Custom Training
    - kind: InvokeAction
      id: bookTraining
      actionName: BookTrainingSession
      input:
        type: =Topic.trainingType

tools.name: Dataverse Customer Records
tools.description: Looks up customer account details, plan info, and onboarding progress

tools.name: Outlook Calendar
tools.description: Schedules training sessions and sends calendar invites

tools.name: Teams Notifications
tools.description: Notifies the Customer Success team when a customer completes onboarding or needs help

powerAutomateFlows.name: Lookup Customer Details
powerAutomateFlows.description: Queries Dataverse for the customer's account, plan type, assigned CSM, and onboarding status
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Personalizes the onboarding experience based on the customer's specific plan and needs

powerAutomateFlows.name: Book Training Session
powerAutomateFlows.description: Checks onboarding team availability and sends a calendar invite for the training session
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Makes it frictionless for customers to get live help during setup

powerAutomateFlows.name: Stalled Onboarding Alert
powerAutomateFlows.description: Sends a proactive check-in message if a customer hasn't progressed in 48 hours
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Prevents customers from dropping off mid-onboarding

additionalSections.title: Prerequisites
additionalSections.content:
1. Dataverse table with customer onboarding records
2. Outlook calendar shared mailbox for the onboarding team
3. Teams channel for CSM notifications
4. Product API access for checking configuration status

additionalSections.title: Metrics Tracked
additionalSections.content:
- Time to complete each onboarding step
- Total onboarding duration (target: < 5 days)
- Training sessions booked vs. completed
- Support tickets created during first 30 days
- Customer satisfaction score at onboarding completion
